# NestJS Architecture Improvement — Ralph Executor

## Objective

Execute every task in `docs/plans/2026-02-20-architecture-improvement.md` to migrate
routes-cli to a clean NestJS-based architecture. One task per iteration. After each task:
verify types, commit, update `PROGRESS.md`. When all tasks are done emit `<promise>LOOP_COMPLETE</promise>`.

---

## Pre-flight (every iteration)

1. Read `PROGRESS.md`. If it does not exist, create it now with all 30 tasks as `PENDING`
   (see initial sta... [truncated, 7742 chars total]
TASK-001 complete: installed NestJS deps, removed commander, typecheck pass
TASK-002 complete: created shared/types/ (universal-address, blockchain-addresses, intent.interface + barrel), typecheck pass, committed
TASK-003 complete: created shared/security/key-handle.ts + barrel, typecheck pass, committed
TASK-004 complete: created shared/errors/routes-cli-error.ts + barrel + shared/index.ts, typecheck pass, committed
TASK-005 complete: created src/config/validation/env.schema.ts with Zod env validation, typecheck pass, committed
TASK-006 complete: created src/config/config.service.ts with typed env getters, typecheck pass, committed
TASK-007 complete: created src/config/tokens.config.ts + src/config/config.module.ts, typecheck pass, committed
TASK-008 complete: created src/blockchain/chain-handler.interface.ts + src/blockchain/chain-registry.service.ts, typecheck pass, committed
TASK-009 complete: migrated evm/tvm/svm chain handlers to @/shared/ imports, removed self-registration side effects, typecheck pass, committed
TASK-010 complete: created AddressNormalizerService, injectable facade delegating to ChainRegistryService handlers, typecheck pass, committed
TASK-011 complete: ChainsService with lazy onModuleInit normalization, RawChainConfig + ChainConfig in shared/types, typecheck pass, committed
TASK-012 complete: RpcService with getUrl/getFallbackUrl/withFallback, typecheck pass, committed
TASK-013 complete: base.publisher.ts + evm/tvm/svm.publisher.ts with @Injectable() and keyHandle.useAsync(), typecheck pass, committed

TASK-014 complete: SVM helpers migrated — only transaction-builder.ts needed @/core/interfaces/intent → @/shared/types update; pda-manager and solana-client were already clean. typecheck pass, committed
TASK-015 complete: client factories already co-located with correct imports — no source changes needed, typecheck pass, committed PROGRESS.md
TASK-016 complete: PublisherFactory injectable service created, typecheck pass, committed

TASK-017 complete: PortalEncoderService and IntentConverterService created as @Injectable() services with AddressNormalizerService DI. Key fix: Borsh pubkey fields use .toBase58() as SvmAddress cast. typecheck pass, committed
TASK-018 complete: BlockchainModule created as @Global() NestJS module, exports all 7 blockchain services. typecheck pass, committed
TASK-019 complete: QuoteService + QuoteModule created. Flat QuoteResult type introduced. typecheck pass, committed
TASK-020 complete: IntentBuilder service created. encodeErc20Transfer inlined via viem encodeFunctionData (method missing from PortalEncoderService). typecheck pass, committed
TASK-021 complete: IntentStorage service + IntentModule created. typecheck pass, committed
TASK-022 complete: StatusService + StatusModule created. IntentStatus defined in base.publisher.ts to avoid circular deps. EVM getStatus() implemented, TVM/SVM stubs added. typecheck pass, committed

TASK-023 complete: PromptService created with selectChain, selectToken, inputAmount, inputAddress, confirmPublish, confirm, inputManualPortal. Injected ChainRegistryService + AddressNormalizerService. typecheck pass, committed
TASK-024 complete: DisplayService created with spinner, log, displayTable, displayTransactionResult, displayChains, displayTokens. typecheck pass, committed
TASK-025 complete: PublishCommand created; swapped nestjs-commander->nest-commander (correct package); typecheck pass, committed
TASK-026 complete: chains, tokens, status, config commands created; typecheck pass, committed
TASK-027 complete: CliModule created with all 5 commands + 2 services; typecheck pass, committed
TASK-028 complete: app.module.ts + main.ts created; ts-node dev script; chain-detector/tokens.config/publisher/CliModule DI fixes; pnpm dev chains + tokens pass
TASK-029 complete: deleted src/core/, src/commands/, src/index.ts, old blockchain/config/cli files; moved AddressNormalizer+PortalEncoder+validation to @/blockchain/utils/; build+smoke tests pass
TASK-030 complete: tsconfig verified (no changes needed, paths+exclude already correct); final smoke tests pass; all 30 tasks COMPLETE
LOOP_COMPLETE
LOOP_COMPLETE
